title: Monkey's Paw
description: Adds Monkey's Paw with mechanics similar to Phasmophobia
body:
![Title](https://imgur.com/XPiqbAn.png)

*Monkey's Paw is a relic from William Wymark Jacobs's horror story, nowadays the item was mainly popularized by the game Phasmophobia which was the main inspiration for this mod*

Monkey's Paw is a Fabric mod that adds as you would have guessed a Monkey's Paw. The item can grant wishes with balanced(hopefully) consequences. The amount of wishes left is indicated by the number of unbent fingers. To wish you need to hold Monkey's Paw in your main hand and enter command /wish #wish text# (e.g. /wish I wish for clear weather).

***

![Monkey's Paw in Woodland Mansion](https://imgur.com/rSLh3Oq.png)

The item can be found in the woodland mansion in any chest. Also you will be able to find name tags with wishes written on them.

<details>
<summary>Wish options:</summary>

## Weather

- I wish for clear weather
- I wish for rainy weather
- I wish for thunderstorm

(grants effect of Nightmare for 40m which doesn't allow player to sleep and spawns phantoms at night)

## Time change

- I wish for daytime
- I wish for nighttime

(also grants Nightmare effect for 40m)

## Other

- I wish to be unseen (grants Invisibility and Darkness effects for 10m with particles turned off)
- I wish to escape (teleports player to a random location in 5000 block radius + grants Blindness and Resistance effects for 10s)
- I wish to sacrifice my stomach (restores player's hp for the cost of their food level + grants Regeneration and Hunger effects for 20s)
- I wish to risk my life (with 50% chance player is granted Second Chance effect for 40m that works like a totem of undying, otherwise player is granted Inevitable Death effect for 40m that will deal lethal amount of damage when the effect runs out)
- I wish for strength (grants Vulnerability and Divine Sword effects for 40m, first will double the damage received by player, second will double the damage that is dealt by player)

</details>

And finally, Monkey's Paw custom effects cannot be removed using milk or honey and you cannot wish for something that grants you same custom effect as you have.

***

![Chapter Help Me](https://imgur.com/aFo0Wpv.png)

You can help me and the development of this mod by giving your feedback or typing your ideas on my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/6d52nzVFJY).

*If you have never played Phasmophobia, I really recommend to try it out*
